title: urginea maritima subsp. littoralis
intro: Urginea maritima subsp. littoralis, also known as Squill or Sea Squill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Urginea maritima subsp. littoralis include potential treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of capsules, tinctures, and teas, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
